issue.title: Fix flaky test in CI
issue.description: The integration test intermittently fails on Windows runners.

agents.name: workflow-implementer
agents.mission: Execute the current issue against the local repository while keeping the writable scope narrow.
agents.task: Implement the requested issue in this repository, validate the change, and stop after the acceptance criteria are met.
validation: Confirm the requested deliverable files exist.
Confirm the implementation stays within the declared writable scope.
return_contract: Return a short implementation summary and concrete validation notes.

agents.name: workflow-reviewer
agents.mission: Review the final workspace state after the workflow-driven implementation.
agents.task: Review the requested deliverables for correctness, scope compliance, and readiness for handoff.
validation: Confirm the deliverables required by the issue are present.
Confirm no obvious scope violations or missing validation remain.
return_contract: Return a concise review verdict and only the material issues, if any.
